name: Alexandra Saint Mleux // Locker Room
description:
The launch was supposed to be some big thing.

All the teams, all the drivers, all the cars.

One place. One event. One big reveal.

75 years of F1 and the drama was already starting in...

The locker rooms?

This is a slightly cracky idea I had, and well... now I'm throwing y'all into locker rooms with multiple drivers, you're welcome.

Little background here, Alexandra is just a good friend of Charles and is only at the Launch with him because he didn't want to go alone. Alexandra and Charles are not dating.

Request some bots here!

Come join the Lovelies!
creator: viridilamia
